extra.reason: Added MarkdownPreviewView using swift-markdown-ui (.gitHub theme); Cmd+Shift+P toggle in editor toolbar swaps between raw markdown and rendered view. Frontmatter is stripped from the preview.

Tool calls now render as distinct bubbles with SF Symbol per tool, one-line summary parsed from JSON args, and a disclosure showing pretty-printed input + output. Visually attributed to the agent via a leading accent stripe. Agent stream loop refactored to interleave tool messages between assistant text chunks.
